channel.title: Timesjobs on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Timesjobs on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: Are you sure ?
item.description: In last 6 months or so, I was looking for a job change so I created my profiles on different job portals. This post is an advice that if you are doing the same, never create your profile on timesjobs.com. It is completely crappy website. They have nothing useful to send you. Rather you will get some useless mails talking about say Storage Admin whereas your profile is of a C/C++ developer.  Moreover I couldn’t find an option to delete the profile from there. Some of the standard mail subjects you will always be receiving from their side:
